introSection: Dragon's Apprentice is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Japan in Nagoya, Aichi, Japan. It opened with the park on 1 April 2017.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

fullText:
Dragon's Apprentice is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Japan in Nagoya, Aichi, Japan. It opened with the park on 1 April 2017.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.
